LLM-First?: Yes - made for LLM agents to call
Notes: Best for LLM-driven software demos. Can integrate with existing Playwright test suites.

What It Does: Records browser sessions for AI coding agents. Video + screenshots + error logs + PR upload.
LLM-First?: Yes - agent-agnostic plugs into any AI coding agent
Notes: Verification-focused. Uploads to GitHub PR as inline comment.

LLM-First?: Yes - built for AI agent use
Notes: Most advanced macOS option. 40+ API endpoints. Zero UI mode for agents.
